violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Per PIC, 3 staff members are scheduled for class and exam. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the kitchen dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC to obtain new chemical solution. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
The 2-door refrigerator in the kitchen was in poor repair, observed out of service. PIC stated repair quotes have been obtained. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC stated she is registered for a class. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the bar dishwasher was 10-25 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

Mashed potato was observed held at 131 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Staff reheated during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Multiple foods were observed held at 45-47 degrees Fahrenheit in the 2-door refrigerator. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods requiring refrigeration were disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

Shrimp was observed thawing in standing water in the prep sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Staff placed in refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The door to the outside, located in the main entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2025
The 2-door refrigerator located in the kitchen area was not in good repair, not maintaining an ambient temperature of 41 degrees F or below. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
The sanitizer auto-dispenser was not connected to sanitizer solution. PIC and inspector filled 3-bay manually during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the main entrance and the trash area, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2025
The dish machine in the kitchen was observed in poor repair, not dispensing sanitizer. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2025
The following were observed in poor repair: -kitchen coving -pieces of kitchen flooring torn -kitchen ceiling tiles missing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the storage room. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
A light in the cook hood was observed non-functional at the time of this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2025
